job_description:
# Clinical Data Analyst - Remote position
Company: Infinite Computer Solutions (ICS)
Source: Dice
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/069bc8fa-4fc4-4f20-9667-b81ba4093c7c

- Remote clinical/healthcare data analyst role.
- Focus on extraction, transformation, validation, dashboards, and HIPAA-aware delivery.
strengths: Healthcare data extraction and validation overlap

replacements.replace: Clinical Data Analyst | SQL | Data Validation | Reporting Support
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience extracting, validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted healthcare data across claims, member, provider, and reporting workflows. Strong expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, data quality, HIPAA-aware handling, and cross-functional support for dashboards and business decision-making.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), stakeholder reporting support
replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)

replacements.replace: Investigated and resolved 70+ production data incidents through end-to-end root-cause analysis with engineering and business partners, protecting SLA-bound pipelines and trusted healthcare data delivery.
replacements.find: Investigated and resolved 70+ production data incidents through end-to-end root-cause analysis with engineering and business partners, protecting SLA-bound pipelines and member-facing data accuracy.

gaps: FHIR/HL7 and clinical workflows are stronger than resume
notes: Tailored toward extract-transform-validate, reporting, HIPAA awareness, and stakeholder collaboration.
validation_notes: official_site_checked is missing or false; official career site was not verified; detail page loaded and posting date is within 60 days
